llm_expertise.preferred_sovereign_model_justification: EU-origin (Mistral AI, France), Apache 2.0 licence, strong French-language performance, self-hostable

explainability_and_trust.low_confidence_action: Display uncertainty warning and escalate to human supervisor
explainability_and_trust.bias_testing_process: Quarterly evaluation on demographically diverse test sets

use_cases_delivered.use_case: Multi-source data synthesis for urban planners

known_ai_trade_offs.explicability_vs_performance: Sovereign open-weight models (Mistral 7B) achieve ~84% relevance vs ~92% for large proprietary models; accepted trade-off for compliance
known_ai_trade_offs.online_learning_vs_gdpr: Real-time learning from user data prohibited; offline quarterly fine-tuning on anonymised data is standard approach
known_ai_trade_offs.model_size_vs_energy: Mistral 7B with INT8 quantisation uses ~80% less energy than 70B models with comparable task performance
known_ai_trade_offs.rag_vs_fine_tune: RAG preferred for frequently updated knowledge bases; fine-tuning reserved for domain tone and format adaptation
